title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management B2B SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer who collaborates with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Near-perfect alignment: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, deep Salesforce expertise matches core need, B2B SaaS fintech background directly relevant to Finout's cloud cost-management focus, and proven scaling experience beyond $30M ARR. Head of RevOps title is exact target role.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and immediately thought of you—the combination of scaling GTM operations in fintech, deep Salesforce admin chops, and building revenue analytics frameworks across globally distributed teams feels like it was written with your background in mind. Having spent 15+ years architecting RevOps functions that drive CAC/LTV optimization and pipeline forecasting in high-growth B2B SaaS, you'd be walking into a company that clearly understands the operational rigor needed to scale beyond $30M ARR. Would be worth a conversation about how your experience could accelerate Finout's next growth phase.

title: Sr. RevOps Program Manager
description: Engine, a fast-growing travel and fintech platform backed by Blackstone and Permira, is hiring a Senior RevOps Program Manager to own the operational rhythm of its go-to-market engine. The role owns the RevOps program portfolio end-to-end—GTM launches, system rollouts, process changes, and enablement initiatives—and builds cross-functional operating cadence across RevOps, Sales Leadership, Finance, and Product. Requires 5+ years in program management, RevOps, sales operations, or GTM operations. Operates on a hybrid-hub model with both office and fully remote options.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Sr. RevOps Program Manager role aligns perfectly with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, fintech background, and GTM program leadership experience. Remote-first structure with USA hub accommodates his flexibility requirements.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps programs that scale GTM engines in B2B SaaS and fintech, and Engine's mandate to own the operational rhythm across Sales, Finance, and Product resonates deeply with my experience. Having architected similar cross-functional operating cadences at high-growth companies backed by institutional capital, I'm impressed by how you're approaching the program portfolio end-to-end.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence B2B SaaS leader, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition and headcount planning, and providing dashboards and regional insights. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced environment. Annual salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, sales operations optimization, and cross-functional leadership with Finance/Strategy align perfectly with Omri's core strengths and target role profile. Remote location and B2B SaaS revenue intelligence leader (Gong) are ideal fits.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps functions in B2B SaaS, and Gong's approach to revenue intelligence resonates deeply. Your Territory Strategy & Operations role caught my attention because redesigning territory models for global scalability and partnering across Sales, Strategy, and Finance is exactly where I've driven the most impact—optimizing CAC/LTV, pipeline forecasting, and headcount planning across multiple regions. I'd love to explore how my experience scaling GTM operations can accelerate your sellers' productivity.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a fundraising automation SaaS for nonprofits, is hiring a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong SQL skills, CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data integration experience. Target salary band $120,000–$170,000 USD plus equity.
score_reason: Strong match on RevOps core competencies (CRM architecture, data integration, AI tooling), remote location works, and B2B SaaS background. Gap: nonprofit fundraising is outside traditional fintech/enterprise SaaS wheelhouse, and role may skew slightly more technical/SQL-heavy than typical RevOps manager focus.

Your RevOps Manager role caught my attention because Instrumentl's mission to automate fundraising aligns with the operational leverage I've built throughout my career, and I'm excited to bring that same technical rigor and systems thinking to a product that fundamentally changes how nonprofits operate.

title: GTM Engineer
